modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't find Virtual Astronomy software on remote desktop.

full_description_text:  
- I'm trying to use the Virtual Astronomy program for my online class.  
- I logged into the remote desktop, but I can't see the app anywhere.  
- I even got an error saying, "This app can't run on your PC," which is super confusing!
short_description: Can't find Virtual Astronomy software on remote desktop.
description:
- I'm trying to use the Virtual Astronomy program for my online class.  
- I logged into the remote desktop, but I can't see the app anywhere.  
- I even got an error saying, "This app can't run on your PC," which is super confusing!
